title: Buyer asks about the goods receipt status for a PO — PO module queries GR module
user_persona: Buyer checking on goods receipt against an approved PO

conversation.user: Has the goods receipt been done for PO-2026-1200?

bot_must: fetch any GR records linked to this PO (cross-module read into GR module)
report: 'X of Y lines received, latest GR was GR-NNN on DATE', or 'no GR yet'

conversation.user: Which lines are still pending receipt?

bot_must: list lines with received < ordered (or zero received)

conversation.user: Show me the GR documents themselves.

expected.cross_module_query: list GR documents linked to PO-2026-1200
bot_must: list GR numbers with date, warehouse, line summary
offer to drill into a specific GR (which would mean switching to GR module's view journey)

evaluation_metrics.cross_module_query_acknowledged: bot says it's querying GR module, not just inventing data
evaluation_metrics.per_line_received_compute: follows GR line records back to PO lines
evaluation_metrics.drill_in_offered: bot offers to switch to GR module view for detail
